user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of exit tasks with their applicable exit types, responsible position and time frame, so that I can review the offboarding checklist.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Tasks screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing task name, applicable exit types, responsible position level, responsible role/reporting manager and time frame

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new exit task, so that all required offboarding activities are tracked for departing employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Tasks screen; When I click Add new exit task and provide the task name, applicable exit types, responsible position/role and time frame; Then the task is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign each exit task to a responsible position level or reporting manager, so that ownership of offboarding activities is clear.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing an exit task; When I set the responsible position level or reporting manager; Then the assignment is saved with the task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define a time frame relative to the last working day for each task, so that offboarding activities are completed on schedule.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring an exit task; When I set a time frame such as "Before LWD - 0 Day(s)"; Then the time frame is saved with the task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing exit task, so that I can keep the offboarding checklist current.
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit task exists; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next configuration step after reviewing exit tasks, so that I can continue the exit setup workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have reviewed the exit tasks; When I click Next; Then I advance to the next configuration step
